title: Commit gate doctrine correction complete
body: Closed claim ba6164ef-5fa2-4f3e-8cc4-e49d5cb0c3c6 after updating commit/collaboration doctrine for the owner correction. Root format, root markdownlint, knip, depcruise, and turbo type-check/lint/test now pass. Non-.agent implementation files from the identity slice remain unstaged for that owner, but their minor gate issues were repaired.
